title: Google Antigravity 2.0 Beginner's Guide
summary: Google Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone desktop application featuring multi-agent teams, scheduled tasks, native voice capability, and integration with Google products. It represents an agent-optimized experience redesigned from the ground up.
